case_title: JEFFREY ANCKER VS. PIUS CHEUNG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62459813)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANCKER, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, PIUS SFMTA CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-21-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-18-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-26-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-19-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-02-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-21-2018 CONTINUED TO MAY-02-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-18-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
